metadata.description: Cluster-level SAE units (anchor + disjoint per-token absorbers) recovered from content-flip co-response on a frozen Gemma-Scope L12/16k SAE; first-letter spelling absorption testbed. E1=label-free recovery vs form-free diagnostic; C1=starts-with-letter classification; E2=absorbed-slice recall; steering=mean-member-decoder side effects.

E2.recovered_count_caveat: recovered-absorber COUNT is circular for oracle baselines g/h (both rank by d_p like the diagnostic); use sliced_recall vs count-matched h/b/c

C1.threshold_artifact_note: per_method.AUC is the threshold-free held-out test-fold point (PRIMARY, reproduces iter-2). accuracy_youden uses a comparison-matched Youden (TPR-FPR) cut and does NOT collapse to predict-all-positive. accuracy_f1thresh keeps the iter-2 F1-optimal cut for transparency: weak detectors collapse to ~0.5 acc there (f1thresh_collapse=True for: ['a', 'REk']) despite non-trivial AUC -- the iter-2 accuracy-as-margin artifact this run replaces with AUC-difference CIs.

E2.recovered_count_caveat: recovered-absorber COUNT is circular for oracle baselines g/h (both rank by d_p like the diagnostic); use sliced_recall vs count-matched h/b/c

C1.threshold_artifact_note: per_method.AUC is the threshold-free held-out test-fold point (PRIMARY, reproduces iter-2). accuracy_youden uses a comparison-matched Youden (TPR-FPR) cut and does NOT collapse to predict-all-positive. accuracy_f1thresh keeps the iter-2 F1-optimal cut for transparency: weak detectors collapse to ~0.5 acc there (f1thresh_collapse=True for: ['a', 'REk']) despite non-trivial AUC -- the iter-2 accuracy-as-margin artifact this run replaces with AUC-difference CIs.

E2.recovered_count_caveat: recovered-absorber COUNT is circular for oracle baselines g/h (both rank by d_p like the diagnostic); use sliced_recall vs count-matched h/b/c

C1.threshold_artifact_note: per_method.AUC is the threshold-free held-out test-fold point (PRIMARY, reproduces iter-2). accuracy_youden uses a comparison-matched Youden (TPR-FPR) cut and does NOT collapse to predict-all-positive. accuracy_f1thresh keeps the iter-2 F1-optimal cut for transparency: weak detectors collapse to ~0.5 acc there (f1thresh_collapse=True for: ['a', 'REk']) despite non-trivial AUC -- the iter-2 accuracy-as-margin artifact this run replaces with AUC-difference CIs.

E2.recovered_count_caveat: recovered-absorber COUNT is circular for oracle baselines g/h (both rank by d_p like the diagnostic); use sliced_recall vs count-matched h/b/c

C1.threshold_artifact_note: per_method.AUC is the threshold-free held-out test-fold point (PRIMARY, reproduces iter-2). accuracy_youden uses a comparison-matched Youden (TPR-FPR) cut and does NOT collapse to predict-all-positive. accuracy_f1thresh keeps the iter-2 F1-optimal cut for transparency: weak detectors collapse to ~0.5 acc there (f1thresh_collapse=True for: ['a', 'h', 'REk']) despite non-trivial AUC -- the iter-2 accuracy-as-margin artifact this run replaces with AUC-difference CIs.

E2.recovered_count_caveat: recovered-absorber COUNT is circular for oracle baselines g/h (both rank by d_p like the diagnostic); use sliced_recall vs count-matched h/b/c

C1.threshold_artifact_note: per_method.AUC is the threshold-free held-out test-fold point (PRIMARY, reproduces iter-2). accuracy_youden uses a comparison-matched Youden (TPR-FPR) cut and does NOT collapse to predict-all-positive. accuracy_f1thresh keeps the iter-2 F1-optimal cut for transparency: weak detectors collapse to ~0.5 acc there (f1thresh_collapse=True for: ['a', 'REk']) despite non-trivial AUC -- the iter-2 accuracy-as-margin artifact this run replaces with AUC-difference CIs.

metadata.endpoint_reconciliation_note: iter-2 method.py:1676 computed the headline 'WORKS' as (E1 AND C1_AUC_point_win) and DROPPED E2 from the conjunction, with NO random-eligible-k control. This iter-3 re-run reports E1 (4/5; fails on I), E2 (2/5; only T,I -- NOT primary L) and the SELECTION test independently, and computes primary_endpoint from the stated falsifier: E1 AND unit-AUC-significantly-above-BOTH-(h)-and-(random-eligible-k) on >=3/5 letters => ABSORPTION_REPAIR_SELECTION_CONFIRMED; else (>=3/5 beat h via eligibility+pooling but not RE-k) => REFRAMED_TO_ELIGIBILITY_POOLING; else SELECTION_NOT_ESTABLISHED. Both outcomes are publishable.

verdicts.per_letter_E1_note: E1 PASS on 4/5 letters; fails on ['I'] (recall-argmax anchor latent fires 0% on corpus).
verdicts.per_letter_E2_note: E2 (count-matched absorbed-slice recall) reported INDEPENDENTLY and NEVER dropped from the conjunction; E2 PASS only on ['T'] -- NOT on primary letter L.

legacy_iter2_view.iter2_endpoint_rule: WORKS = (E1 AND C1_AUC_point_win), E2 DROPPED from the conjunction
legacy_iter2_view.note: iter-2 method.py:1676 computed WORKS without E2 and without a random-eligible-k control; this run reports E1, E2 and the SELECTION test (unit vs h AND RE-k) independently.
